---
title: "Collected Simulations"
author: "Ugne Milasiunaite"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
source("./simulation.R")
# source file loads
# library(survival)
# library(icenReg)
# library(flexsurv)

set.seed(1984)

# Common parameters for the simulations
n.iter <- 1000
widths <- c("1" = 1, "2" = 30, "3" = 365)  # interval widths
duration <- 365  # enrollment duration
N <- 2000

# Setting-specific parameters
followup1 <- 365
days1 <- c(30, 60, 90, 120, 150, 180, 210, 240, 270, 300, 333, 365)
followup5 <- 1826
days5 <- c(365, 730, 1095, 1461, 1826)

# Parameters for plotting
m.cols <- c("darkorange", "red", "brown", "forestgreen", "royalblue", "cyan3")
```

## Weibull

# Short-term survival

```{r}
pars <- c("shape" = 0.7, "scale" = 200)
P <- 1 - pweibull(days1, pars[["shape"]], pars[["scale"]])

df.pars <- list(
  "n" = N,
  "dist" = "weibull",
  "pars" = pars,
  "duration" = duration,
  "followup" = followup1,
  "width" = widths
)

df <- do.call(generate_df, df.pars)
est <- repeat_estimation(n.iter, days1, df.pars, names(pars))

par.bias <- average_bias(est[["pars"]], pars)
prob.bias <- average_bias(est[["prob"]], P)

plot_bias(prob.bias[,,1], m.cols)
plot_bias(prob.bias[,,2], m.cols)
plot_bias(prob.bias[,,3], m.cols)

par.bias[,,1]
par.bias[,,2]
par.bias[,,3]
```

# Long-term survival

```{r}
pars <- c("shape" = 0.6, "scale" = 2000)
P <- 1 - pweibull(days5, pars[["shape"]], pars[["scale"]])

df.pars <- list(
  "n" = N,
  "dist" = "weibull",
  "pars" = pars,
  "duration" = duration,
  "followup" = followup5,
  "width" = widths
)

df <- do.call(generate_df, df.pars)
est <- repeat_estimation(n.iter, days5, df.pars, names(pars))

par.bias <- average_bias(est[["pars"]], pars)
prob.bias <- average_bias(est[["prob"]], P)

plot_bias(prob.bias[,,1], m.cols)
plot_bias(prob.bias[,,2], m.cols)
plot_bias(prob.bias[,,3], m.cols)

par.bias[,,1]
par.bias[,,2]
par.bias[,,3]
```

## Gamma

# Short-term survival

```{r}
pars <- c("shape" = 5, "rate" = 0.02)
P <- 1 - pgamma(days1, pars[["shape"]], pars[["rate"]])
plot(days1, P, ylim = c(0,1))
```


```{r}
df.pars <- list(
  "n" = N,
  "dist" = "gamma",
  "pars" = pars,
  "duration" = duration,
  "followup" = followup1,
  "width" = widths
)

df <- do.call(generate_df, df.pars)
est <- repeat_estimation(n.iter, days1, df.pars, names(pars))

par.bias <- average_bias(est[["pars"]], pars)
prob.bias <- average_bias(est[["prob"]], P)

plot_bias(prob.bias[,,1], m.cols, "width=1")
plot_bias(prob.bias[,,2], m.cols, "width=30")
plot_bias(prob.bias[,,3], m.cols, "width=365")

par.bias[,,1]
par.bias[,,2]
par.bias[,,3]
```

# Long-term survival

```{r}
pars <- c("shape" = 18, "rate" = 0.01)
P <- 1 - pgamma(days5, pars[["shape"]], pars[["rate"]])
plot(days5, P, ylim = c(0,1))
```

```{r}
df.pars <- list(
  "n" = N,
  "dist" = "gamma",
  "pars" = pars,
  "duration" = duration,
  "followup" = followup5,
  "width" = widths
)

df <- do.call(generate_df, df.pars)
est <- repeat_estimation(n.iter, days5, df.pars, names(pars))

par.bias <- average_bias(est[["pars"]], pars)
prob.bias <- average_bias(est[["prob"]], P)

plot_bias(prob.bias[,,1], m.cols, 1)
plot_bias(prob.bias[,,2], m.cols, 30)
plot_bias(prob.bias[,,3], m.cols, 365)

par.bias[,,1]
par.bias[,,2]
par.bias[,,3]
```
